momentum_short_term_reversal.hypothesis: Short-term winners reverse: stocks with high recent returns underperform going forward
momentum_short_term_reversal.mechanism: Overreaction and profit-taking by short-term traders create mean-reversion pressure

evidence_records.failure_type: ['BRAIN gate LOW_SHARPE FAIL: value=0.56 limit=1.25', 'BRAIN gate LOW_FITNESS FAIL: value=0.21 limit=1.0']
['BRAIN gate LOW_SHARPE FAIL: value=0.02 limit=1.25', 'BRAIN gate LOW_FITNESS FAIL: value=0.0 limit=1.0']

momentum_medium_term_continuation.hypothesis: Medium-term trends persist: stocks with sustained momentum continue to outperform
momentum_medium_term_continuation.mechanism: Gradual information diffusion and herding behavior sustain price trends

momentum_volume_confirmed.hypothesis: Volume change confirms price trend: price moves backed by volume are more reliable
momentum_volume_confirmed.mechanism: Volume reflects conviction; price-volume divergence signals weak trends

value_regression.hypothesis: Low valuation stocks earn higher future returns due to mean reversion in valuation multiples
value_regression.mechanism: Value premium from risk compensation and mispricing correction over time

value_earnings_quality.hypothesis: High earnings-to-price ratio indicates undervaluation and predicts higher returns
value_earnings_quality.mechanism: Earnings yield captures profitability relative to price; high yield signals underpricing

quality_earnings_stability.hypothesis: Companies with stable earnings outperform due to lower uncertainty and risk premium
quality_earnings_stability.mechanism: Earnings stability reduces discount rates and attracts risk-averse institutional capital

quality_asset_turnover.hypothesis: High asset turnover indicates operational efficiency and predicts superior returns
quality_asset_turnover.mechanism: Efficient resource utilization signals competitive advantage and management quality

size_small_cap_premium.hypothesis: Small-cap stocks earn higher returns due to higher risk and lower analyst coverage
size_small_cap_premium.mechanism: Size premium from liquidity risk, information asymmetry, and neglected-firm effect

volatility_low_vol_anomaly.hypothesis: Low-volatility stocks deliver superior risk-adjusted returns due to leverage constraints and lottery preferences
volatility_low_vol_anomaly.mechanism: Investors overpay for lottery-like payoffs in high-vol stocks, depressing their risk-adjusted returns

volatility_change_signal.hypothesis: Declining volatility predicts positive returns as uncertainty resolves favorably
volatility_change_signal.mechanism: Volatility compression signals market consensus and reduced risk premium

liquidity_premium.hypothesis: Illiquid stocks earn higher returns as compensation for higher transaction costs and difficulty of exit
liquidity_premium.mechanism: Liquidity premium compensates for the risk of being unable to sell quickly at fair value

liquidity_improvement_signal.hypothesis: Improving liquidity signals growing institutional interest and predicts positive returns
liquidity_improvement_signal.mechanism: Increasing volume attracts more market participants, reducing information asymmetry

lead_lag_price_volume.hypothesis: Price changes lead volume changes: price moves predict subsequent volume reaction
lead_lag_price_volume.mechanism: Informed traders move prices first; uninformed traders react with volume lag

lead_lag_cross_field.hypothesis: One data field's movement precedes another: cross-field lead-lag captures information diffusion delay
lead_lag_cross_field.mechanism: Different data sources update at different speeds, creating exploitable temporal gaps

momentum_long_term_reversal.hypothesis: Long-term winners underperform long-term losers over multi-year horizons due to overreaction correction
momentum_long_term_reversal.mechanism: De Bondt & Thaler overreaction: extreme past returns predict reversal over 3-5 year horizons

lead_lag_industry_rotation.hypothesis: Industry rotation follows predictable patterns: leading industries' returns predict lagging industries
lead_lag_industry_rotation.mechanism: Sector fund flows and economic cycle create temporal lead-lag across industries

mean_reversion_zscore.hypothesis: Extreme Z-score deviations from short-term mean predict reversion to mean
mean_reversion_zscore.mechanism: Prices deviate from statistical mean due to noise traders; rational arbitrageurs push back

mean_reversion_bollinger.hypothesis: Prices revert to moving average after breaching Bollinger-style bands
mean_reversion_bollinger.mechanism: Overbought/oversold signals from statistical boundaries create predictable reversion

mean_reversion_valuation.hypothesis: Extreme valuation multiples revert toward long-term sector median
mean_reversion_valuation.mechanism: Sector-relative valuation extremes reflect temporary mispricing that corrects over time

volatility_clustering.hypothesis: Volatility clusters persist: periods of high (low) volatility tend to be followed by high (low) volatility
volatility_clustering.mechanism: Volatility regime persistence creates predictable risk premium variation
